name: AICAR
subtitle: 5-Aminoimidazole-4-carboxamide Ribonucleotide | AMPK Activator
overview: AICAR is a cell-permeable nucleoside analog that activates AMP-activated protein kinase (AMPK), a key regulator of cellular energy homeostasis. Originally studied for cardiac ischemia protection, it gained attention as an 'exercise mimetic' due to its metabolic effects.
mechanism: Once inside cells, AICAR is phosphorylated to ZMP, which mimics AMP and activates AMPK. This triggers metabolic pathways typically activated during exercise: increased glucose uptake, fatty acid oxidation, and mitochondrial biogenesis.

items.name: AMPK Activation
items.description: Directly activates the master metabolic regulator through ZMP accumulation.

items.name: Fatty Acid Oxidation
items.description: Increases fat burning through AMPK-mediated pathways.

items.name: Glucose Metabolism
items.description: Enhances glucose uptake independent of insulin in some tissues.

items.name: Endurance Enhancement
items.description: Animal studies showed increased running endurance; human data limited.

items.name: Mitochondrial Biogenesis
items.description: AMPK activation promotes new mitochondria formation over time.

items.name: Ischemia Protection
items.description: Original clinical interest; may protect heart tissue during reduced blood flow.

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous injection once daily. Progressive dosing protocols are common to assess tolerance.

steps: Allow vial to reach room temperature
Clean rubber stopper with alcohol swab
Inject slowly along vial wall to avoid foaming
Gently swirl to dissolve; never shake
Label with date and store refrigerated at 2-8°C

interactions.notes: Both activate AMPK through different mechanisms. Combined use may have additive effects on glucose metabolism.
Different pathways (AMPK vs PPARδ) that may complement metabolic effects. Popular research combination.
Rev-ErbA agonist with complementary metabolic effects.

timeline.effects: Subtle changes in energy levels; body adjusting to AMPK activation
Potential improvements in endurance capacity and metabolic markers
Cumulative metabolic adaptations; enhanced fat oxidation
Full effects on mitochondrial density and metabolic efficiency

stopSigns: Lactic acidosis symptoms (muscle pain, weakness, difficulty breathing)
monitoring: Monitor blood glucose, especially if diabetic
Limited human safety data at research doses

good: Certificate of Analysis with purity testing
warning: Slight yellowing may occur but should dissolve clearly

references.title: AMPK and Exercise: Glucose Uptake and Insulin Sensitivity
references.keyFindings: Review of AMPK role in exercise-induced metabolic adaptations and AICAR as pharmacological activator.

references.title: AICAR Mouse Endurance Study
references.keyFindings: Mice treated with AICAR showed 44% increase in running endurance without training.
